svg.title: v1 → v2 ontology migration (2026-05-25 → 2026-05-26) — sankey-style flow per axis
svg.desc: Five stacked axis sections (Output, Injection, Control, Temporal, Domain) each showing v1 → v2 value flow. Colour encodes change type: grey=unchanged, blue=rename, orange=split, teal=merge, red=demote/delete, purple=v2 new. 32 v1 values → 35 v2 values (+5 new, -2 removed, 5 renames, 2 splits, 2 merges).
svg.text: 19 dissection headers re-signed · 5 sed-safe renames + 2 splits + 2 merges + 4 new values + 2 deletions
rigid · fluid · cloth · soft · granular · multi-phase · contact-rich · articulated · deformable
